title: Aranet Atmospheric Pressure Delta — Door or Filter Breach Indicator
app: MQTT or HEC ingest for Aranet barometric sensors
spl:
index=environment sourcetype=aranet:sensor sensor_id=* pressure_hpa=*
| sort 0 _time
| streamstats window=6 global=f earliest(pressure_hpa) as p0 latest(pressure_hpa) as p1 by sensor_id
| eval delta_hpa=round(p1-p0,2)
| where abs(delta_hpa) > 2.5
| table _time, sensor_id, location, p0, p1, delta_hpa
| eval abs_delta=abs(delta_hpa)
| sort - abs_delta
description: Sudden pressure steps in zoned facilities can indicate opened airlocks, blown filters, or failed dampers when correlated with access control. Aranet atmospheric pressure sensors sampled every few minutes make a coarse differential-pressure proxy when dedicated DP transmitters are not wired to BMS.
value: Adds environmental corroboration for physical security and contamination controls without installing separate DP wiring everywhere.
implementation: Requires stable indoor placement away from weather-dominated entries; pair with outdoor reference sensor subtracted in `eval` if available. `streamstats` window=6 assumes ~30 minutes of 5-minute polls—adjust for your cadence. Tune `delta_hpa` (hPa) to facility noise floor; correlate with door badge and HVAC mode changes to reduce false positives.
visualization: Line chart (pressure_hpa), Timeline (alerts), Overlay with door access logs via `join`.

references.title: Aranet — air quality and atmospheric pressure sensors

detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Reference sensor or weather feed optional but strongly recommended.
• Document HVAC economizer cycles that move pressure.

Step 1 — Backtest window on a year of data.

Step 2 — Add `by zone_id` if multiple sensors per room.

Step 3 — Physical security runbook cross-links.

Step 4 — Privacy review if combined with badge data.
grandmaExplanation: We watch what edge sensors report from the physical world. We help you know if something is off with the situation around: aranet atmospheric pressure delta — door or filter breach indicator before harm, damage, or wasted effort piles up.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable for CIM; ensure metrics index access and mstats permissions for the indexes in the search.
knownFalsePositives: AQI spikes during cooking, cleaning, paint or solvent use, or HVAC maintenance.
